title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed, grounded in mathematical foundations rather than the latest tools, builds durable skills that survive hype cycles. He contends that people shape AI rather than the reverse, and warns against the "AI-Native" trap of becoming dependent on current tools.
